scope.target: Land selected legacy decision rules into .dev/standards and clarify prompt ownership boundaries
constraints: Promote missing hard rules into standards before legacy-source retirement
Do not delete legacy prompt examples yet
non_goals: No full prompt-body migration into .ai yet

inputs.architecture_target: Reduce legacy-record reliance by strengthening standards and clarifying canonical ownership
review_findings: Prompt bodies should not remain canonical in .dev/standards/prompts
Explicit registration, environment/profile loading, and profile-specific DI still had hard-rule gaps in standards
user_constraints: Continue the workflow on a dedicated branch

steps: Added profile-configuration-standards.md as the normative target for environment/profile rules
Linked the new standard from coding-standards indexes
Elevated explicit DI registration rule into usecase standards
Extended test standards and ASP.NET Core checklist with profile/environment constraints
validation: Prompt ownership boundary is now explicit in standards docs
Explicit registration hard rule is discoverable in standards
Environment/profile loading and profile-specific DI hard rules are discoverable in standards
deferred_items: Retire or downgrade duplicate legacy records
Move any remaining reusable prompt bodies into .ai assets if needed
Split mixed rule/tutorial decision families such as outbox pattern and outbox mapper completeness

results.summary: Landed the first batch of legacy-decision-derived hard rules into standards and clarified prompt ownership boundaries.
